SEARCH
Module org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject
Package org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils

Class Log

java.lang.Object
org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.Log
public final class Log extends Object
Provides logging functionality for the application. Logs messages to the console and optionally to a file with timestamps. Supports action, info, warning, and error logging levels. Design Choice: Centralized logging improves debugging, tracking, and maintainability. File size is limited to prevent excessive storage usage.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Faariz Sheikh
Date:
2026-03-17

  • Method Details

    • time

      private static String time()
      Gets the current timestamp.
      Returns:
      formatted current date and time

    • writeToFile

      private static void writeToFile(String msg)
      Writes a log message to file.
      Parameters:
      msg - message to log to the console and to the log file

    • action

      public static void action(String action, String details)
      Logs a detailed action.
      Parameters:
      action - action type
      details - additional details to log to the log file

    • info

      public static void info(String msg)
      Logs an informational message.
      Parameters:
      msg - message to log to the console

    • warn

      public static void warn(String msg)
      Logs a warning message.
      Parameters:
      msg - message to log to the console

    • error

      public static void error(String msg, Exception e)
      Logs an error message with exception details.
      Parameters:
      msg - error message to log to the console
      e - exception thrown
